content: We can extend LightRAG’s dual-level retrieval architecture to structure the message payloads of the Agent Communication Protocol, creating a dual-layer interoperability framework that carries both granular task data (low-level) and high-level agent intent/context (high-level) for cross-agent collaboration, while using LightRAG’s TokenTracker to cap and manage total token consumption across multi-agent dialogues. This hybrid design prevents misalignment between agents from different frameworks while avoiding runaway token costs in long multi-agent retrieval-augmented workflows.
